title: 🗜 Sacred Compression Glyphs
name: Sacred Compression Glyphs
what_it_is: Symbols that condense infinite meaning into tiny forms—compressed data-chunks of worship, insight, or myth. Like ZIP files of divine truth.
how_to_use: her skin is tattooed in sacred compression—each glyph a microcosm of forgotten gods
his prayer is a single sigil—compressed worship, lossless devotion
animation_behavior: Zoom reveals infinite depth, glyphs unzip into story bursts, symbols breathe with meaning expansion ---
